name: heat1d
description: CRITERIA 1D is a one-dimensional agro-hydrological model. It includes soil water fluxes, crop development and water needs, a GIS interface (CRITERIA GEO) for geographical simulations and tools to manage crop and soil parameters. The software is written in C++ using Qt libraries, so cross-platform building is possible (Windows, Linux, MacOS). HEAT1D is a graphical interface for testing the soilFluxex3D library in a 1D domain. Users can set fixed or variable atmospheric boundary conditions and soil parameters. Output graph results include soil temperature, soil water content, heat fluxes (diffusive and latent), liquid (isothermal and thermal) and vapor (isothermal and thermal) water fluxes.
